title: surenus mexicana
intro: Surenus mexicana, also known as Mexican Prickly Poppy, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Surenus mexicana include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in digestion. Surenus mexicana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
